benefits.description: Reports good overall health, no aches or pains, physically active at 58; unclear if attributable to Epitalon

protocol_notes: Originally ran experiment starting around 2016 with intent to track telomere length over time via repeated testing; testing companies kept going out of business (Titanova, etc.). Used Epitalon minimally, once or twice a year after initial experiment. Does not currently use it. Male pattern baldness unaffected.
